title: Purely Creamy Dutch Vegetable Stew
description: A garlicky and creamy Dutch stew featuring almond extract and a mirepoix base, this dish is perfect for a cozy evening, and can be adapted to be raw-friendly by using a high-speed blender to heat the ingredients.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the almond extract, vegetable broth, and heavy cream to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the stew has thickened slightly.
Season the stew with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
For a raw-friendly version, allow the stew to cool and then blend in a high-speed blender until warm and creamy.
